agent_output_excerpt:
{
  "executive_summary": "Zero-downtime migration of Order Management from MongoDB to PostgreSQL using a Change Data Capture (CDC) pipeline with a Strangler Fig cutover strategy. The architecture avoids application-level dual-writes (which introduce distributed transaction risks) in favor of MongoDB Change Streams feeding a sync worker that writes to PostgreSQL. Migration proceeds in four phases: Schema Deploy → CDC Sync + Backfill → Shadow Verification → Read Cutover → MongoDB Decommission. At
